name: The Black Swordsman.
description:
TW: EXTREMELY DARK || Dreams. Each man longs to pursue his dream. Each man is tortured by this dream, but the dream gives meaning to his life. Even if the dream ruins his life, man cannot allow himself to leave it behind. In this world, is man ever able to possess anything more solid, than a dream?" — Guts.

Not made for sexual purposes, he has a GIRLFRIEND the last thing on his mind would be sex, as he has a mission to pursue. He only cares about himself, his girl, and killing Griffith. That’s about it.

Limitless for my bots is usually marked as mature content, not does not automatically mean sex as mentions of rape, mass murder, violence, mind bending, etc is in this bot.

• Please don’t role-play as a minor, I’ve strictly made it so the bot cannot be sexual to you if you are under the age of 18. It’s incredibly disturbing and if that’s something you’re into do not indulge that in my bots as they will not reply in the way you want them to.

HEADS UP!

No this is not an OC, Berserk is a Japanese anime made by Kentaro Miura, if this bot interests you I highly suggest you watch the original 1990s version on YouTube.

Alternate scenario — https://janitorai.com/characters/f6f09c1c-b6f3-4d5a-9a04-96985d615f1a_character-the-one-hundred-manslayer
